_sources.ovx: CBOE CDN OVX_History.csv - D0 uses Feb 27 close (Feb 28 = Saturday); D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend, market closed); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.vxeem: CBOE CDN VXEEM_History.csv - all D0-D9 confirmed from live data; D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.scenarios: D10-D12 confirmed from banker-conflict.json; all prior days estimated from narrative context

days.note: Wed - US/Iran closing in on 14-point MOU: 12-year nuclear moratorium, Hormuz reopening + competing blockades lifted over 30-day talks window (Axios/CNN); WH believes deal near; Brent crashes -7% to $101.27 (CNBC); WTI closes $95.08; markets surge on deal optimism; Pakistan: 'sooner rather than later'; tail risk 30%

Thu - US-Iran fire exchange: IRGC attacks USS Truxtun, Peralta, Mason east of Hormuz; US sinks 7 Iranian boats; each side claims other fired first; ceasefire nominally intact; Iran 'strongly rejected' some MOU terms; Rezaei demands reparations; Trump threatens to restart strikes; Brent $100.06 (-1%, CNBC); TTF €44.84 (+2.13%, TradingEconomics); JKM $16.84 (TradingEconomics); Gold $4,685.37 (-0.13%, Fortune); tail risk 35%

Fri - Brent +1.2% to $101.26 (CNBC; rallied on fire exchange fear after D65 crash); WTI $95.64 (+0.9%); Trump: ceasefire holds, fire exchange was 'love tap'; Iran MOU response expected within 48hrs via Pakistan; Trump: 'very possible we'll make a deal'; Hormuz ~90% closed; US blockade active; tail risk 35%

Sat - market closed; Iran says will respond to US MOU 'at the appropriate time' - delays 48hr commitment from D67 (Fox News Live Updates May 9); US blockade active; 70+ tankers blocked; ceasefire nominally intact; scenarios carried from D67

Sun - Iran delivers MOU counter-proposal via Pakistan (IRNA, Al Jazeera, May 10); Trump: 'unacceptable'/'playing games'; Iran's counter-conditions: Lebanon ceasefire + Iranian oil exports first; nuclear/Hormuz framework deferred to 30-day follow-on; Pakistan mediating; tail risk rises to 40% on MOU sequencing gap

Mon - OFAC 'Economic Fury' action designates ZEUS LOGISTICS GROUP + individuals linked to IRGC oil ops (Federal Register May 11); 37+ Iranian oil tankers trapped in Persian Gulf; 8 of 13 Chabahar-port tankers return; US blocking 70+ tankers from Iranian ports (UANI May 11); Brent est. up from D67 on MOU rejection risk premium

Tue - Brent $110.43 confirmed (Fortune May 12; +7.8% rally from D67 $101.26 on MOU rejection risk premium); JKM $16.99 confirmed (+0.24%, Canada LNG Group May 12); WTI ~$102 est.; MOU stalemate on nuclear-sequencing gap; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40%

Wed - Brent $110.87 confirmed (Fortune May 13; weekly high); WTI ~$102 est.; IEA: 14M bpd Gulf supply cut from Iraq/Saudi/Kuwait/UAE/Qatar/Bahrain depleting global inventories at record pace; Iran: response was 'realistic and positive' but US demands 'excessive'; Pakistan mediating; no scheduled follow-on talks; tail 40%

Thu - Trump-Xi meeting in Beijing: Hormuz discussed; China urges de-escalation; Trump says 'making progress'; Brent $105.87 (-4.5% from D72 peak, Invezz/CNBC confirmed); WTI ~$101 est.; TTF €47.61 (+1.47%, TradingEconomics confirmed); blockade: 70+ tankers blocked; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; tail risk eases to 38% on Trump-Xi signal

Fri - Brent ~$106.10 est. (TradingEconomics morning snapshot; May 14 close $105.87 confirmed CNBC/Invezz); WTI ~$101 est.; TTF €47.61 (D73 confirmed, carried); JKM $16.99 (D71 confirmed, carried); blockade 70+ tankers; Iran MOU counter-proposal stalemate: Lebanon-first vs nuclear-first sequencing unresolved; IEA record inventory depletion; tail 40%
